characters.description: An enhanced human Forerunner racing to Paris for a meeting with Earth's other active representatives. He has a portal on his family property and seeks help from covert alien observers when ordinary travel cannot get him there in time.
characters.name: Silas Renner

characters.description: Silas's deceased uncle and predecessor as a Forerunner. His legacy placed Silas on the Forerunner path.
characters.name: Daniel Becker

characters.description: Silas's sister and one of the family members he intends to protect as Earth's deadline approaches.
characters.name: Cecilia

characters.description: A veteran Earth Forerunner who attends the Paris meeting about the planet's score and Emil Larsson's suspicious imprisonment. She agrees to help prepare an attempt to reach him.
characters.name: Annika

characters.description: A veteran Earth Forerunner at the Paris meeting. She stresses that Earth needs every active Forerunner completing missions and recognizes Silas's unusually strong first week.
characters.name: Nuri

characters.description: One of the veteran Earth Forerunners at the Paris meeting. He shares the others' interest in Earth's score amid clear distrust within the group.
characters.name: Jiang

characters.description: An Earth Forerunner imprisoned after an attack. His ability to escape makes his continued confinement suspicious, prompting the others to ask Silas to investigate.
characters.name: Emil Larsson

characters.description: An established Galen teammate who joins Silas's Darji containment mission. She fights at close range and helps handle the first undead test set by his prospective mentor.
characters.name: Dory

characters.description: An established Galen teammate who joins the Darji mission. He serves on the front line against the undead while Silas's prospective mentor evaluates the group.
characters.name: Crag

characters.description: An established Galen teammate and spellcaster who answers Silas's call for the Darji mission. His magic helps the group defeat the undead sent to test them.
characters.name: Nevin

characters.description: A heavily armed Numari affiliated with House Raiden who appears during the Darji containment mission. He releases three undead drones to test Silas's team while presenting himself only as a prospective mentor.
characters.name: Unnamed prospective mentor

characters.description: A level-125 rare Numari affiliated with House Raiden who evaluates Silas and his team during a Darji containment mission. He offers Silas outer-family membership, clan protection, relocation options, and direct mentorship.
characters.name: Samvek Raiden

characters.description: An unusual plant-like Eidolon accompanying Silas during the Darji containment mission.
characters.name: Silas's Eidolon

characters.description: An intelligent undead caster guarding an outer graveyard plot with two linked armored drones. It detects Silas Renner's identification magic and attacks with black fire that threatens the soul.
characters.name: Darji Smolder

characters.description: A four-armed devilkin sentinel guarding an illuminated oasis behind an energy screen. It recognizes Silas Renner as the killer of the takers and attacks him.
characters.name: Devilkin cedar

characters.description: An incorporeal female Darji released from a sarcophagus after Silas chooses the wrong item in a trapped crypt. The recording calls her the unnamed necromancer's beloved.
characters.name: Unnamed Darji banshee

characters.description: An unnamed Darji necromancer whose recorded voice presents a book and dagger as a test of whether Silas will follow his path. The choice activates a trap involving the banshee he calls his beloved.
characters.name: Unnamed Darji necromancer

characters.description: The former Darji necromancer, now revealed as the dungeon's rare lich. He inhabits a hell-infused undead elemental construct and confronts Silas's party in the core plot.
characters.name: Darji dungeon lich

characters.description: The legendary leader of the Raiden clan and Samvek's father. He arrives with an elite party to resolve the priority quest created by the hell incursion and confirms Silas's standing as an inner disciple.
characters.name: Lord Samuel Raiden

characters.description: The same symbiotic companion previously known only as Silas's Eidolon. Erg can take a dark, spiked combat form and withdraw into Silas's shadow.
characters.name: Erg

characters.description: The military leader of a displaced people living in a failing desert refuge. After Silas swears secrecy and nonaggression, Dejek admits him to the settlement's hidden water source and farms.
characters.name: Dejek

characters.description: Dejek's son, committed to become the fifth member of Silas's team in exchange for assistance given to his displaced people.
characters.name: Dejin

characters.description: One of three hostile elven Forerunners hunting Silas on Proximus. She attacks from range while her companions pressure him on the ground.
characters.name: Unnamed elven archer

characters.description: One of three hostile elven Forerunners pursuing Silas on Proximus as part of a revenge mission. This attacker supports the ambush with magic.
characters.name: Unnamed elven mage

characters.description: An uncommon elven Forerunner who engages Silas with a sword during the Proximus ambush. He is one of three pursuers assigned to a revenge mission against Silas.
characters.name: Unnamed elven swordsman

characters.description: The sole known Barjek Forerunner, a rare level-125 scythe wielder who arrives through the elves' signal portal. He challenges Silas to a System duel and presents an overwhelming threat.
characters.name: Morvarg Silon of Barjek

characters.description: An epic-tier vice regional leader of the Adventurers Guild. She intervenes when competing corporate delegations crowd Silas in Unwich and has the authority to separate them.
characters.name: Selmak

characters.description: A representative of the covert alien observers studying Earth. He arranges rapid transport for Silas while his people's presence and intentions remain largely concealed.
characters.name: Alien liaison
